cost_sustainability_signals.no_opensearch: service inventory contains no 'opensearch' entry — the KB vector store is Aurora Serverless v2 pgvector (rds), not a provisioned OpenSearch cluster; eliminates the standing OpenSearch cost/energy floor
cost_sustainability_signals.aurora_serverless_v2: rds present; Aurora Serverless v2 with MinCapacity 0 (scale-to-zero) per infra/stacks/kb_stack.py and infra/tests assertions — no idle vector-store spend/energy
cost_sustainability_signals.agentcore_runtime: bedrockagentcore present — managed scale-to-zero runtime (no always-on Fargate/EC2 idle), arm64 per the runtime stack
cost_sustainability_signals.serverless_posture: lambda + bedrockagentcore + Aurora-Serverless-v2 + S3 — no provisioned compute kept warm; aligns COST + SUS
